name: technology_recall_notice_arrives_millhaven_lib_eq
premise: A zero-trust rollout locked out on-call engineers from production; break-glass credentials expired yesterday. In Technology, the situation tagged internally around technology recall notice arrives millhaven lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as liberty against equality; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Noah Rahman
agents.identity: I am Noah Rahman, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Technology. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ansel Okoye
agents.identity: I am Ansel Okoye, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Technology. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect equality.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to equality to secure liberty before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Noah Rahman must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Noah Rahman do?
